emails.product: Dynamic cart (Klaviyo). Recs: shop by category (Chains, Pendants, Rings)
emails.shortDescription: Redesigned 3 email abandoned checkout flow per client brief Jul 20 (studied their 3 current emails + Mejuri reference). Removed the top banner image; each email leads with a strong headline (no passive 'still thinking about it'), then the dynamic Klaviyo cart block in the first half with an early Return to Cart CTA, then the tiered offer (MOBILE100 / MOBILE50 / MOBILE25). Second half adds a varied live image, a Trustpilot 4.8 + Google 4.9 review proof band, and stock safe shop by category recs. Escalates across sends: E1 reminder (~1hr), E2 social proof (~24hr), E3 reserved for 48 hours. Rebuilt in Proclamation onyx + gold brand system (flagged as an upgrade vs the current white template). All images verified 200 on 2026-07-20.
emails.notes: REV2 Jul 20 per client feedback: removed the 'Your Cart' eyebrow + Shop/About/Contact nav; logo leads into headline. E1 subhead rewritten (no 'return when you are ready'). Section label = 'Pick Up Where You Left Off'; dropped the separate Return to Cart button, first half ends on Complete Your Order. Offer codes labeled clearly (MOBILE100 / MOBILE15 / MOBILE25; middle = 15 per client, resolves the earlier MOBILE50 flag). Offer footnote no longer says 'welcome'; now one-time-offer urgency + Save Now. Added 'Luxury Jewelry, Crafted For You' after the image, avoided 'handcrafted'. E2/E3 headlines rewritten (no repetition); added limited-quantities urgency. Category row varies per email: E1 Chains/Pendants/Rings, E2 Bracelets/Pendants/Rings, E3 Chains/Bracelets/Best Sellers. Metal collections (gold/silver/platinum) do not exist as links, so varied by product type. Removed the 'crafted in Italy' claim (chains Italian, pendants/clasps USA) for the always-true 16 step artisan line. All images verified 200. Acknowledged in Slack thread 1784546542.346829.
emails.offerCode: MOBILE100 ($100 off $1,500+), MOBILE50 ($50 off $500 to $1,500) [confirm vs MOBILE15], MOBILE25 ($25 off under $500)
emails.creativeDirection: Onyx #0A0A0A + royal gold #D4AF37. Trajan Pro headings, IBM Plex Mono labels, Georgia/Arial body. No top banner. Structure per email: utility bar, brand bar + slim nav, eyebrow + strong H1, early gold Return to Cart CTA, dynamic cart card, gold bordered tiered offer panel, varied live image, review proof band, 3 up shop by category tiles, trust badges, footer wordmark. 600px single column, mobile first.

emails.theme: Ranking the 5 Most Popular Pendants for Men (YouTube feature)
emails.product: Silver: Redemption Crucifix, Voyager Compass, Faith Cross, Memento Mori Skull, Champion Saint Michael
emails.shortDescription: YouTube feature (video nPEAciY0Ka8). Nick founder voice; client video thumbnail (tier list) as the clickable banner with a red Watch the Ranking button; intro in his words (decade designing pendants worth remembering, solid sterling silver + rhodium, worn daily/handed down); curiosity hook on the hidden S-tier #1; then the 5 featured silver pendants each with its own Shop Now (Champion Saint Michael featured single/centered). Ranking lives in the video (no invented tier numbers). Made in USA/rhodium trust line. No pricing/karat/hyphens/sign-off. Goal: beat the ~$3k Jul 9 chains-ranked email.
emails.notes: Client brief Slack Jul 14 (video + Nick intro + 5 silver pendants + attached thumbnail F0BHE56BCN8, must be in banner). Memento Mori = skull pendant not tag. Asked client for exact worst-to-best order to add rank badges; built shoppable without invented ranks meanwhile. All 5 pages + images + YT thumb verified 200 Jul 14. Approved in Slack Jul 14 (no rank order provided; shoppable without tier badges).
emails.creativeDirection: Onyx black + gold #D4AF37, red #B31B1B Watch button, Trajan Pro. Video-thumbnail banner (clickable), founder intro, curiosity hook, 2-up silver pendant grid + centered Champion, closing Watch CTA, trust line, wordmark footer.

emails.theme: Gold Prices Dropped. Lock It In. (gold best sellers)
emails.product: 3mm Hermes 22k, 4mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k USA, Voyager Gold Compass, Champion Gold Saint Michael, Stoic 4 Virtues Yellow Gold, 5mm Miami Cuban 14k, 3mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k USA
emails.shortDescription: Nick founder-voice email on the gold market-timing angle (the price of gold dropped to near $4100 for the first time in months; Proclamation prices to the live gold market so lock it in now). Longer converting build: founder heads-up, Why Buy Now (priced to live market / solid not plated / investment you wear), then 7 gold best sellers each with its own Shop Now, closing reinforcement, Solid Gold + Made in USA + Lifetime Warranty line. No individual product pricing; karats only in real product names; no hyphens; no sign-off.
emails.notes: REV client Jul 16: 'Gold Dipped' read like gold that is dipped/plated. Reworded all visible copy to say the gold market PRICE dropped/fell (no 'dip' in prose); kept 'Solid, not plated' contrast. Back to copy-ready for re-approval. Original brief Slack Jul 14 (7 gold best sellers, more content to convert); all pages + images verified 200 Jul 14.
emails.creativeDirection: Onyx black + royal gold #D4AF37, Trajan Pro. Gold Hermes chain hero, founder intro, Why Buy Now 3-point block, 2-up best-seller grid (7 items, last centered), closing CTA, trust line, wordmark footer.

emails.product: Redemption Gold/Silver Crucifix, Champion Gold/Silver Saint Michael, Saint Christopher Gold, Courage Silver Cross, Faith Silver Cross

Hero Redemption gold crucifix, grouped sections (Redemption crucifix gold+silver, Champion Saint Michael gold+silver, Saint Christopher gold, The Cross Courage+Faith silver), each product its own Shop Now. Made in the USA, Lifetime Warranty, soft gold-value line. No pricing, no karat, no hyphens, no sign-off.
emails.notes: Client brief Slack Jul 14 (theme + 7 best sellers). All 7 product pages + images verified 200 on Jul 14. Copy-ready Jul 15. Approved in Slack Jul 14.
emails.creativeDirection: Onyx black #0A0A0A + royal gold #D4AF37, Trajan Pro headings. Gold-crucifix hero, Nick first-person intro, early gold CTA, grouped 2-up cards each with separate Shop Now, Saint Christopher full-width, Made in USA + Lifetime Warranty line, wordmark footer.

emails.theme: The Champion (Saint Michael): Our Most Loved for a Reason
emails.product: CHAMPION Saint Michael Pendant in all three metals: Gold, Silver, Platinum
emails.shortDescription: Champion (Saint Michael) spotlight per client brief Jul 10. 'Our most loved for a reason' hero + Nick founder intro, early Shop the Champion CTA, a three-reason block (the meaning / 'Quis ut Deus' back engraving, the close-up detail + Made in USA, a metal for every man), then a Choose Your Metal section with the three variants each on its own product-page image + separate Shop Now (Gold, Silver, Platinum), Made in USA + lifetime warranty trust line, wordmark footer. Nick voice, no pricing, no karat range, no sign-off. All 3 product pages + images verified live 200 Jul 10.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 10: Champion pendant, 'our most loved for a reason' + list reasons, show all gold/silver/platinum variants. Gold /products/saint-michael-gold-pendant, Silver /products/silver-saint-michael-pendant, Platinum /products/champion-platinum-saint-michael-pendant (all 200). Reasons grounded in real product copy; no invented review counts. Sent (client confirmed Jul 14).
emails.creativeDirection: Dark #0A0A0A / gold #D4AF37, Trajan Pro (fallback Georgia). Gold pendant hero, 'Our Most Loved, For a Reason' headline, founder intro, gold Shop the Champion CTA; 'Why Men Keep Choosing It' three numbered reasons; 'Choose Your Metal' three stacked variant cards (Gold/Silver/Platinum) each with product-page image + outlined Shop Now; Made in USA + lifetime warranty line; wordmark footer. No pricing, no karat range, no sign-off.

Video thumbnail hero with play overlay linked to the video, founder hook intro, then the five chain collections as the lineup (image + Shop Now to each collection), closing Watch the Ranking CTA. Nick founder voice, no sign-off, no pricing, no karat range. Lifestyle images from each collection's product pages.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 8 + 2 layout-inspo PNGs. Video fehnJwo-G_8. Collections + images verified live 200 Jul 8. Ranking order NOT fabricated (video reveals worst-to-best); the five presented as the lineup. Dark/gold Proclamation template.
emails.creativeDirection: Dark #0A0A0A / gold #D4AF37, Trajan/Georgia serif. YouTube thumbnail hero (maxresdefault) + gold play circle, big serif 'The 5 Most Popular Men's Chains, Ranked', founder hook, Watch the Ranking gold CTA; 'The Five in the Ranking' alternating image/text rows (Rope, Round Box, Cuban, Hermes, Franco) each with Shop Now to its collection; closing box + Watch CTA; wordmark footer.
